offer: For property managers processing 5–15 commercial properties, manual updates cause cash flow gaps. We automate rent roll updates instead of manual spreadsheets and reports.
problem: Manual updates of rent rolls are time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar challenges
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Join forums where property managers discuss tools and workflows
try_it: Let users try customizable reporting templates and dashboard for tracking updates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video showcasing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding to first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for updates
Allow CSV import for existing rent roll data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
